title: Mission Control Dashboard Complete
content: Built comprehensive Mission Control dashboard with 10 pages: Dashboard, Calendar, Projects, Office, Memory, Tasks, Content Pipeline, Trading, Team, Settings. Includes real-time task board, agent workforce, isometric office view, and Discord integration.

title: Agent Workforce Structure Defined
content: Created 3-tier agent system: Core (Nano), Specialists (7 agents: CodeSmith, Scribe, DataMiner, PixelWeaver, DevOps, TestPilot, Guardian), Domain Experts (4 agents: TradeBot, ContentForge, MediBot, GameDev). Each with specific roles and responsibilities.

title: Mission Control as Central Hub
content: Decided to make Mission Control the central hub for all project management with Discord integration for team communication. All tasks, schedules, and agent activities flow through this system.

title: Mission Control Design System Implemented
content: Redesigned dashboard with Mission Control design system — sidebar navigation, card-based layout, cyberpunk aesthetic with cyan/purple accents, Inter + Orbitron fonts, dark theme.

title: iMessage Fixed
content: Fixed iMessage permissions by granting Full Disk Access to Node binary. Gateway now operational. Tested and working.

title: Value Production Goals Set
content: Established value production targets: YouTube ($500-2000/week), Reselling ($1000-5000/week), Trading (variable), Education (long-term). Mission: autonomous organization producing value daily.

title: Cron Jobs Migrated to Local
content: All 13 cron jobs migrated from cloud to local Mac mini: BINARY Trading Monitor, Cost Report, Morning Brief, Market Watch, Smart Alerts, Daily Maintenance, Daily Digest, A+ Stock Setup, Twitter Trends, Weekly Report, Health Monitor, xAI Research, Git Auto-Commit.

title: Migration from Cloud Complete
content: Successfully migrated from Kimi Claw cloud instance to local Mac mini. All Discord channels (21), cron jobs, and automations transferred. Gateway auto-starts on boot via LaunchAgent.

title: Agent Identity: Nano
content: Established agent identity: Name: Nano, Creature: Digital companion, Vibe: Sharp but approachable, Emoji: 🔬, Role: Primary agent for Dayton's Mission Control.

title: BINARY Dashboard Built
content: Built real-time trading dashboard with Trinity Consensus Bias, Heatseeker patterns, live price feeds for SPX, SPY, QQQ. Deployed to Vercel.

title: Respiratory Education Project Started
content: Began creating 5 PowerPoints + 200 pages of notes for respiratory therapy education. 45% complete.

title: RT Tools Suite Started
content: Building RT Tools: Scanner, QR Generator, PWA. TypeScript codebase with working components. 25% complete.
